name: git-galaxy
description: Every repository becomes a galaxy. Stars are commits. Planets are folders. Satellites are files.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @git-galaxy/server" "npm run dev -w @git-galaxy/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @git-galaxy/web && npm run build -w @git-galaxy/server
